5.2 Recommended Prompt Flow

Instructions:
  1. Begin with the single objective sentence.
  2. Provide the thematic and conceptual inputs.
  3. List the technical and procedural components.
  4. Include the organizational and workflow requirements.
  5. Conclude with all constraints and the desired output format.

Checklist:
  • [ ] Objective statement present
  • [ ] Concepts included
  • [ ] Technical elements listed
  • [ ] Organizational needs covered
  • [ ] Constraints and format finalized
